id: 20260713-091704-修复全量会话扫描导致的高内存占用
title: 修复全量会话扫描导致的高内存占用

requestAffinity.note: Studio SDK child runs use the same Pi SDK/provider/auth/model-registry path as the parent chat, but provider request affinity is keyed by the independent child session id rather than reusing the parent session id.

subagents.summary:
架构分析与修复计划已完成，未修改生产代码。

产出目录：

`.ypi/tasks/20260713-091704-修复全量会话扫描导致的高内存占用/`

已更新：

- `brief.md`
- `prd.md`
- `ui.md`
- `design.md`
- `implement.md`
- `checks.md`
- `plan-review.md`
- `handoff.md`

关键结论：

- 已确认 SDK `buildSessionInfo()` 的 `allMessages[]` 与 `allMessagesText` 是主要根因。
- 方案采用有界增量 JSONL 元数据扫描，不接受整行 `JSON.parse` 作为超大消息场景的最终实现。
- 覆盖 active、archive、archive-all、allowed-roots、删除、Studio child 与 Usage 边界。
- 不涉及用户可见行为变化，因此无需 UI HTML prototype。
- 已提供 5 个子任务的机器可读 Implementation Plan。

验证：

- `git diff --check` 通过。
- 所有必需 artifact 均存在且非空。
- 已检索确认当前高内存调用点和 SDK 正文累计代码。

主会话待办：

1. 保存 `implement.md` 中的 implementationPlan。
2. 通过 `plan-review.md` 请求用户审批并进入 `awaiting_approval`。
3. 用户明确批准后再开始实现。

剩余风险主要是增量 JSON tokenizer 的转义、chunk 边界正确性，以及 `modified`、标题前 50 字和归档语义兼容。

transcript.taskId: 20260713-091704-修复全量会话扫描导致的高内存占用

requestAffinity.note: Studio SDK child runs use the same Pi SDK/provider/auth/model-registry path as the parent chat, but provider request affinity is keyed by the independent child session id rather than reusing the parent session id.

subagents.summary:
### Implementation Complete

#### Subtask
**META-001** — 有界流式会话元数据扫描器

#### Files Changed

- `lib/session-metadata-scanner.ts` — 新增：chunk 级 JSON 状态机 + 单文件扫描 + 固定并发 inventory；只保留有界元数据，不产生 `allMessagesText` / 不整行 `JSON.parse` / 不 `readFile` 全文
- `scripts/test-session-metadata-scanner.mjs` — META-001 验收测试（字段兼容、chunk 边界、超大 content、orphan/malformed、inventory API）

#### Verification

- `node --loader ./scripts/ts-extension-loader.mjs --disable-warning=MODULE_TYPELESS_PACKAGE_JSON scripts/test-session-metadata-scanner.mjs` — **all tests passed**
- `npm run lint` — pass
- `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — pass

#### Notes / Risks

- Tokenizer 自研，已覆盖 escape / Unicode / chunk=1 / 随机 chunk / 超大 content；仍建议 META-004 用 SDK fixture 做差分与隔离进程 heap 门禁
- `firstMessage` 默认上限 **100** 字符（与 design/API 建议一致）；展示 50 字由现有 `session-title` 负责
- 默认并发 **8**；header 字符串有 8KiB 上限，name 512，单 record 64MiB 硬顶防恶意输入
- **未接入** `session-reader` / archive（属 META-002/003）；生产路径仍走 SDK `listAll`

#### Decisions for main session

- 可将 META-001 标为 **done**，接着 claim **META-002** 与 **META-003**（可并行）

transcript.taskId: 20260713-091704-修复全量会话扫描导致的高内存占用

requestAffinity.note: Studio SDK child runs use the same Pi SDK/provider/auth/model-registry path as the parent chat, but provider request affinity is keyed by the independent child session id rather than reusing the parent session id.

subagents.summary:
### Implementation Complete — META-003

#### Files Changed

- `lib/session-reader.ts`
  - `scanArchivedCwds`: replaced whole-file `readFileSync(...).split` with bounded `readFirstLineSync`
  - `listArchivedSessions`: uses `scanSessionInventory({ rootDir: archiveDir })` + header metadata mapping; no `SessionManager.open` / `getEntries()` for list metadata
  - Added `mapArchivedLightweightSession` for archive wire mapping (Studio child / project link / counts / name / firstMessage)
  - `listArchivedSessionMetadata`: kept header-only path for usage rollup (still no full bodies)
- `app/api/sessions/archive-all/route.ts`
  - Replaced `SessionManager.listAll()` with `scanSessionInventory()`
  - cwd matching via expand/canonicalize alias keys (better historic alias match)

#### Verification

- `node scripts/test-session-metadata-scanner.mjs` — pass
- `npm run lint` — pass
- `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — pass
- `rg -n 'SessionManager\.listAll' lib app` — no live inventory calls left (comments only)

#### Notes / Risks

- Archived list `modified` now follows scanner activity-time semantics (user/assistant activity → header → mtime), not pure `fs.mtime`. Aligns with PRD; may reorder some archived rows vs old behavior.
- Archived `firstMessage` is first **user** text (bounded), not first message entry of any role.
- `updateParentSessionRefs` still whole-file reads on archive/unarchive move (out of META-003 list/inventory scope).
- `listArchivedSessionMetadata` remains header-only (`messageCount: 0`, `firstMessage: "(metadata only)"`) for usage rollup; full archived metadata is on `listArchivedSessions`.
- META-004 should still cover archive title/count/sort diff and archive-all regression.

#### Main session

- Mark META-003 done; META-004 is next after META-002 completes.
- No product decision needed.

transcript.taskId: 20260713-091704-修复全量会话扫描导致的高内存占用

requestAffinity.note: Studio SDK child runs use the same Pi SDK/provider/auth/model-registry path as the parent chat, but provider request affinity is keyed by the independent child session id rather than reusing the parent session id.

subagents.summary:
### Implementation Complete — META-002

#### Files Changed

- `lib/session-reader.ts` — active inventory consumers now use `scanSessionInventory()`:
  - `listAllSessionsUncached`
  - `listSessionCwdsForAllowedRoots`
  - `deleteSessionsForCwd`
  - `pruneDeletedWorktreeSessions` / `deleteSessionFile` typed on `LightweightSessionMetadata`
  - path cache, 1s snapshot cache, WorkTree prune, Studio child filter, project link header read, parent path→id mapping, git enrichment unchanged
- `app/api/projects/[projectId]/spaces/[spaceId]/sessions/route.ts` — timing comment now says lightweight inventory (not `SessionManager.listAll`)
- `lib/usage-stats.ts` — **no code change**; inventory already goes through `listAllSessions`; only per-session `SessionManager.open().getEntries()` remains for usage entry scan (out of scope)

#### Verification

- `rg -n 'SessionManager\.listAll' lib app` — **no live call sites**; only comments (archive-all already on lightweight scanner, likely META-003)
- `node scripts/test-session-metadata-scanner.mjs` — all passed
- `npm run lint` — exit 0
- `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — exit 0

#### Notes / Risks

- Active list wire shape preserved: same `SessionInfo` fields, Studio child default hide, `firstMessage || "(no messages)"`, `modified` from scanner activity time (not bare mtime).
- **META-003 overlap observed**: archive list / `archive-all` already use the lightweight scanner in this tree; META-002 did not own those paths.
- Residual risk for checker: title/`modified`/`name` parity vs old SDK path under real fixtures (META-004).
- Usage still opens full session files for assistant usage — intentional; inventory no longer retains `allMessagesText`.

#### Parent next

- Mark META-002 done; continue META-003 if anything still open, else META-004 regression/memory gates.

itemsPreview.text:
docs/modules/api.md:120:Project-space and global session list responses keep the existing wire shape (id/cwd/name/messageCount/firstMessage/modified, Studio child nesting, project/space link, archive flags). Inventory is produced by `lib/session-metadata-scanner.ts` via `lib/session-reader.ts` — not Pi SDK `SessionManager.listAll()` / `buildSessionInfo()`, which accumulate `allMessages[]` and `allMessagesText` for every session.
docs/modules/api.md:124:| `GET /api/sessions`, project-space sessions | `listAllSessions()` → `scanSessionInventory()` |
docs/modules/api.md:125:| Allowed-roots cwd discovery | `listSessionCwdsForAllowedRoots()` → `scanSessionInventory()` |
docs/modules/api.md:126:| WorkTree session delete-by-cwd | `deleteSessionsForCwd()` → `scanSessionInventory()` |
docs/modules/api.md:127:| `POST /api/sessions/archive-all` | direct `scanSessionInventory()` then cwd filter + move |
docs/modules/api.md:128:| Archived session lists | `scanSessionInventory({ rootDir: sessions-archive })` |
docs/modules/api.md:131:List reads use a bounded one-second single-flight snapshot and invalidate it on session deletion/archive/unarchive. JSONL remains authoritative; any sidecar index is only an optimization candidate and must reconcile against session inventory before filtering. Scanner concurrency is fixed (default 8); `firstMessage` is bounded (default 100 chars; UI still shows 50 normalized chars). Results and caches must not retain full message bodies, tool results, or `allMessagesText`.
docs/architecture/overview.md:100:`pi-web-session-index.json` is a best-effort performance sidecar for newly linked/forked sessions. Session JSONL headers remain the source of truth for project-space linkage. Session-list inventory is produced by the project-owned bounded scanner in `lib/session-metadata-scanner.ts` (not Pi SDK `SessionManager.listAll()` / `buildSessionInfo()`): it streams each JSONL by chunk, extracts only list metadata, and never retains `allMessages` / `allMessagesText` or full message/tool content. List reads then apply a bounded one-second single-flight snapshot and invalidate it after local delete/archive/unarchive mutations; stale external writes are reconciled by the short TTL. The index must never be treated as an exclusion list without inventory/header reconciliation. Detail/context/branch/export and Usage assistant-usage scans may still open target files fully; only inventory/list/batch cwd operations stay on the lightweight path.
docs/architecture/overview.md:138:- Active inventory (`listAllSessions`, allowed-roots cwd discovery, delete-by-cwd, archive-all) and archived list inventory reuse `scanSessionInventory()` / `scanSessionMetadata()` from `lib/session-metadata-scanner.ts`. Results keep path/id/cwd/name/parent path, created/modified, messageCount, and a bounded `firstMessage` (API default 100 chars; UI titles still use the existing 50-char display normalization). Single-file failures are isolated; malformed/orphan files are omitted rather than failing the whole list.
docs/architecture/overview.md:153:Active sessions live under `sessions/`; archived sessions live under `sessions-archive/`. Both directories are enumerated by the same lightweight metadata scanner with different roots (`scanSessionInventory()` vs `scanSessionInventory({ rootDir: getSessionsArchiveDir() })`). `scanArchivedCwds()` remains a cheaper header-only cwd/count pass (first line of one file per archive dir) for project picker visibility. Project visibility is preserved by returning `archivedCwds` and `archivedCounts` from `GET /api/sessions`, allowing the CWD picker to include projects that have only archived sessions. Archive-all matches target sessions by canonical cwd against the lightweight active inventory and must not call SDK `SessionManager.listAll()`.
docs/architecture/overview.md:155:### Session inventory memory contract
docs/architecture/overview.md:158:- **Out of scope (may open full files):** session detail, context/branch tree, export, and Usage precise assistant-`usage` scans for selected sessions. Usage still builds its session set from the lightweight inventory (`listAllSessions` / archived helpers with `includeStudioChildren: true`) and must not depend on `allMessagesText`.
docs/modules/library.md:14:| `lib/session-metadata-scanner.ts` | Project-owned bounded streaming JSONL inventory scanner. Enumerates active/archive `*.jsonl` with fixed concurrency (default 8), reads by chunk (not full-file `readFile`, not whole-line `JSON.parse`, not `SessionManager.getEntries()`), and returns `LightweightSessionMetadata` only: path/id/cwd/name/parentSessionPath/created/modified/messageCount/bounded firstMessage (default 100 chars). Skips message/tool/compaction/custom content after capture budgets; never builds `allMessages` / `allMessagesText`. Exports `scanSessionMetadata`, `scanSessionMetadataFromChunks`, `scanSessionFiles`, `scanSessionInventory`. Malformed/orphan files return null and are omitted. |
docs/modules/library.md:15:| `lib/session-reader.ts` | Parse `.jsonl` session files, resolve session paths, and map lightweight inventory into API `SessionInfo` wire summaries. Active inventory, allowed-roots cwd discovery, and delete-by-cwd call `scanSessionInventory()` instead of SDK `SessionManager.listAll()`. Git/worktree metadata is opt-in; YPI Studio child audit sessions are hidden by default unless `includeStudioChildren: true` (Usage/audit). Studio child summaries set `legacyUnassigned=false` without changing normal sidebar defaults; UI callers may opt in to `studioChildDisplay` projection from Studio task metadata so child titles prefer task names without adding task I/O to usage scans. Also prunes/deletes sessions for removed WorkTree cwd paths and reads model/default config. Archive helpers: `getSessionsArchiveDir()`, `archiveSessionFile()`, `unarchiveSessionFile()`, `scanArchivedCwds()` (header-only cwd counts), `listArchivedSessionsForCwd()` / `listAllArchivedSessions()` (lightweight scanner over `sessions-archive`), `listAllArchivedSessionMetadata()` (header-only metadata for Usage session sets), `resolveArchivedSessionPath()`. Single-session detail still uses `SessionManager.open` / `getEntries` when needed. |
docs/modules/library.md:109:`lib/session-metadata-scanner.ts` owns bounded inventory extraction; `lib/session-reader.ts` owns wire mapping, Studio/project projection, WorkTree prune, and the session-list snapshot cache. The cache is bounded and short-lived (1s TTL, single-flight, small key limit), shares concurrent scans, and must be invalidated after in-process session file mutations (delete/archive/unarchive). Session JSONL remains authoritative; index data cannot be used as an exclusion list without inventory/header reconciliation.
docs/modules/library.md:114:- **Do not retain:** `allMessages` / `allMessagesText`, full message content, tool results, compaction summaries, custom entry payloads.

 docs/modules/library.md       | 17 +++++++++++++++--

- `docs/modules/api.md` — Expanded **Session List Performance** with call-path table (list/allowed-roots/delete/archive-all/archived), wire compatibility, cache, bounds, tests, rollback.

`AGENTS.md` top-level navigation unchanged (as planned).

#### Verification

#### Notes / Risks

#### Handoff to main session

- META-005 ready to mark **done** (plan 5/5).
- No product decisions needed.

itemsPreview.inputPreview:
{
  "path": "/Volumes/01/ExternalStorage/Projects/gitProjects/pi-agnet-web/.ypi/tasks/20260713-091704-修复全量会话扫描导致的高内存占用/review.md",
  "content": "# Check Complete

## Scope

Task **20260713-091704-修复全量会话扫描导致的高内存占用** — full checker review of META-001…005 implementation against PRD / Design / Implement / Checks.

UI gate: **not triggered** (`ui.md`); no HTML prototype required.

## Implementation evidence reviewed

| Area | Evidence |
| --- | --- |
| Scanner | `lib/session-metadata-scanner.ts` — chunk stream tokenizer, fixed concurrency, bounded firstMessage/name, no `allMessagesText` |
| Active inventory | `lib/session-reader.ts` — `listAllSessionsUncached` / allowed-roots / delete-by-cwd → `scanSessionInventory()` |
| Archive | `listArchivedSessions` → `scanSessionInventory({ rootDir: archive })`; `scanArchivedCwds` header-only; `archive-all` → `scanSessionInventory()` |
| Usage | `lib/usage-stats.ts` — session set from lightweight lists; precise totals still open target files |
| Tests | `scripts/test-session-metadata-scanner.mjs`, `scripts/test-session-list-performance.mjs` + package scripts |
| Docs | `docs/architecture/overview.md`, `docs/modules/api.md`, `docs/modules/library.md` |

## Findings Fixed

None (no in-scope low-risk defects requiring checker patches).

## Remaining Findings

### Blocking

None.

### Non-blocking / residual

1. **Archived list semantic alignment (intentional):** old archive path used **file mtime** for `modified` and first **message entry** (any role) for title; new shared scanner uses **last user/assistant activity** and **first user** text per PRD/Design. Sorting/relative time/title for some archived rows may change vs pre-fix; active list semantics and PRD remain the contract.
2. **Mid-file corrupt line stricter than SDK:** SDK `parseSessionEntryLine` skips bad lines; local tokenizer marks the file malformed and omits it. Inventory isolation across files is correct; a single partially-corrupt JSONL may disappear from list while SDK would still surface it.
3. **Peak capture still walks later messages:** after `firstMessage` is filled, content strings are still captured up to the 100-char budget (not full body). Memory remains bounded; optional future micro-optimization is pure skip once title is set.
4. **`updateParentSessionRefs` still full-file rewrites** on archive/unarchive of siblings — out of inventory scope; not a list-scan regression.
5. **Live browser smoke** on production-sized `~/.pi/agent/sessions` not executed in this check run; automated structural/memory/wire gates cover the acceptance contract.

## Compatibility notes

- **Studio child:** default hide; `includeStudioChildren` / project-space nest / header `studioChild` unchanged; `parentSessionId` path→id mapping verified for active list.
- **Usage:** no `allMessagesText` dependency; inventory is lightweight; assistant usage still per-file `getEntries`.
- **`SessionManager.listAll`:** zero production call sites under `lib/` / `app/` (comments only). Remaining `getEntries` limited to single-session detail/context/export/Usage/RPC — allowed by design.
- **Wire shape:** `SessionInfo` fields preserved; no UI component changes.

## Verification

| Command | Result |
| --- | --- |
| `npm run test:session-metadata` | Pass (17 tests) |
| `npm run test:session-list-performance` | Pass — structural no-body, wire/Studio/archive, heap non-linear (~0 MB growth on +11.4 MB body), SDK baseline higher (~94 MB vs ~43 MB heap on fixture), source gate |
| `npm run lint` | Pass |
| `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` | Pass |
| `git diff --check` | Pass |
| `rg SessionManager.listAll lib app` | Only comments / docs; no inventory call sites |

## Verdict

**Pass**

Requirements R1–R4 are met: inventory memory is bounded metadata, production list/archive/allowed-roots/delete/archive-all no longer call SDK `listAll`/`buildSessionInfo`, behavior is covered by differential + memory gates, and docs match the implementation. Residual items are documented non-blockers; no rework required before acceptance.

## Handoff to main session

- Required artifact `review.md` written; `checks.md` checklist updated.
- No code changes by checker.
- Next workflow step: acceptance / summary as owner decides; optional human smoke on real session corpus.
- No product decisions needed.
"
}

META-001.summary:
### Implementation Complete

#### Subtask
**META-001** — 有界流式会话元数据扫描器

#### Files Changed

- `lib/session-metadata-scanner.ts` — 新增：chunk 级 JSON 状态机 + 单文件扫描 + 固定并发 inventory；只保留有界元数据，不产生 `allMessagesText` / 不整行 `JSON.parse` / 不 `readFile` 全文
- `scripts/test-session-metadata-scanner.mjs` — META-001 验收测试（字段兼容、chunk 边界、超大 content、orphan/malformed、inventory API）

#### Verification

- `node --loader ./scripts/ts-extension-loader.mjs --disable-warning=MODULE_TYPELESS_PACKAGE_JSON scripts/test-session-metadata-scanner.mjs` — **all tests passed**
- `npm run lint` — pass
- `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — pass

#### Notes / Risks

- Tokenizer 自研，已覆盖 escape / Unicode / chunk=1 / 随机 chunk / 超大 content；仍建议 META-004 用 SDK fixture 做差分与隔离进程 heap 门禁
- `firstMessage` 默认上限 **100** 字符（与 design/API 建议一致）；展示 50 字由现有 `session-title` 负责
- 默认并发 **8**；header 字符串有 8KiB 上限，name 512，单 record 64MiB 硬顶防恶意输入
- **未接入** `session-reader` / archive（属 META-002/003）；生产路径仍走 SDK `listAll`

#### Decisions for main session

- 可将 META-001 标为 **done**，接着 claim **META-002** 与 **META-003**（可并行）

META-002.summary:
### Implementation Complete — META-002

#### Files Changed

- `lib/session-reader.ts` — active inventory consumers now use `scanSessionInventory()`:
  - `listAllSessionsUncached`
  - `listSessionCwdsForAllowedRoots`
  - `deleteSessionsForCwd`
  - `pruneDeletedWorktreeSessions` / `deleteSessionFile` typed on `LightweightSessionMetadata`
  - path cache, 1s snapshot cache, WorkTree prune, Studio child filter, project link header read, parent path→id mapping, git enrichment unchanged
- `app/api/projects/[projectId]/spaces/[spaceId]/sessions/route.ts` — timing comment now says lightweight inventory (not `SessionManager.listAll`)
- `lib/usage-stats.ts` — **no code change**; inventory already goes through `listAllSessions`; only per-session `SessionManager.open().getEntries()` remains for usage entry scan (out of scope)

#### Verification

- `rg -n 'SessionManager\.listAll' lib app` — **no live call sites**; only comments (archive-all already on lightweight scanner, likely META-003)
- `node scripts/test-session-metadata-scanner.mjs` — all passed
- `npm run lint` — exit 0
- `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — exit 0

#### Notes / Risks

- Active list wire shape preserved: same `SessionInfo` fields, Studio child default hide, `firstMessage || "(no messages)"`, `modified` from scanner activity time (not bare mtime).
- **META-003 overlap observed**: archive list / `archive-all` already use the lightweight scanner in this tree; META-002 did not own those paths.
- Residual risk for checker: title/`modified`/`name` parity vs old SDK path under real fixtures (META-004).
- Usage still opens full session files for assistant usage — intentional; inventory no longer retains `allMessagesText`.

#### Parent next

- Mark META-002 done; continue META-003 if anything still open, else META-004 regression/memory gates.

META-003.summary:
### Implementation Complete — META-003

#### Files Changed

- `lib/session-reader.ts`
  - `scanArchivedCwds`: replaced whole-file `readFileSync(...).split` with bounded `readFirstLineSync`
  - `listArchivedSessions`: uses `scanSessionInventory({ rootDir: archiveDir })` + header metadata mapping; no `SessionManager.open` / `getEntries()` for list metadata
  - Added `mapArchivedLightweightSession` for archive wire mapping (Studio child / project link / counts / name / firstMessage)
  - `listArchivedSessionMetadata`: kept header-only path for usage rollup (still no full bodies)
- `app/api/sessions/archive-all/route.ts`
  - Replaced `SessionManager.listAll()` with `scanSessionInventory()`
  - cwd matching via expand/canonicalize alias keys (better historic alias match)

#### Verification

- `node scripts/test-session-metadata-scanner.mjs` — pass
- `npm run lint` — pass
- `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — pass
- `rg -n 'SessionManager\.listAll' lib app` — no live inventory calls left (comments only)

#### Notes / Risks

- Archived list `modified` now follows scanner activity-time semantics (user/assistant activity → header → mtime), not pure `fs.mtime`. Aligns with PRD; may reorder some archived rows vs old behavior.
- Archived `firstMessage` is first **user** text (bounded), not first message entry of any role.
- `updateParentSessionRefs` still whole-file reads on archive/unarchive move (out of META-003 list/inventory scope).
- `listArchivedSessionMetadata` remains header-only (`messageCount: 0`, `firstMessage: "(metadata only)"`) for usage rollup; full archived metadata is on `listArchivedSessions`.
- META-004 should still cover archive title/count/sort diff and archive-all regression.

#### Main session

- Mark META-003 done; META-004 is next after META-002 completes.
- No product decision needed.

META-004.summary:
### Implementation Complete — META-004

#### Files Changed

- `scripts/test-session-metadata-scanner.mjs` — SDK metadata 差分、Unicode/嵌套未知字段、空会话 placeholder、malformed 隔离、前 50 字 display 兼容
- `scripts/test-session-list-performance.mjs` — **新增**：正文不保留结构门禁、active/archive/Studio child/parent API 回归、`--expose-gc` 内存缩放门禁、隔离进程 SDK `listAll` 基线对比、源码调用门禁
- `package.json` — 增加 `test:session-metadata`、`test:session-list-performance`

#### Verification

- `npm run test:session-metadata` — pass
- `npm run test:session-list-performance` — pass  
  - 大 fixture：body +11.4MB 时 heapGrowth ≈ 0  
  - SDK 基线：light ser≈1.5KB / heap≈43MB vs sdk ser≈24MB / heap≈94MB，且 sdk 保留 body markers
- `npm run lint` — pass
- `node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit` — pass

#### Notes / Risks

- 数值内存门禁刻意宽松（平台抖动）；硬门禁是「结果无 body marker / 无 `allMessagesText`」与 serialized payload 对比。
- 子进程不可写 `task.json`：请主会话将 **META-004 → done**，进度 **4/5**，下一步 **META-005**（文档）。
- 本子任务未改生产代码；META-005 前实现已具备可复跑回归门禁。

META-005.summary:

#### Handoff to main session
